label: Wells Fargo
description: Update your legal name on your Wells Fargo accounts, cards, and records.

process.summary: Visit a Wells Fargo branch in person with your updated government-issued ID and legal name change documentation.

steps.description: Gather your updated government-issued photo ID and your legal name change documentation (court order).
Visit any Wells Fargo branch. Request a legal name change on your accounts.
The associate processes the update and orders new cards with your updated name. Your account and card numbers do not change.
Verify the name is updated in your online banking profile and update any automatic payment methods that reference your old name.

access_requirements.travel_note: An in-person branch visit is required.

process.estimated_time_days: Same-day update in branch; 5 to 7 business days for new cards.

discrimination_notes: The CFPB accepts complaints about discriminatory treatment by financial institutions.

presence_level_content.some_guidance: Same process as other major banks. Updated ID plus court order, in person.
